General Dentistry

General Dentistry in Kolkata | Checkups, Fillings & Preventive Care

Sushmita's Dental Clinic offers comprehensive general dentistry services at our clinic in Jagannath Apartment, Salt Lake City, Kolkata. We believe that preventive care is the foundation of lifelong dental health.

From routine dental checkups and professional cleanings to tooth fillings, extractions, and diagnostic X-rays, our general dentistry services cover all the essentials. We use the latest digital X-ray technology for precise diagnosis and minimal radiation exposure.

Our clinic serves patients from across Kolkata including New Town, Dum Dum, Jadavpur, Howrah, and all surrounding areas. Whether you need a simple checkup or complex restorative treatment, our team is here for you at Salt Lake Sector II.

Key Benefits

  • Comprehensive oral health assessment
  • Professional scaling and polishing
  • Tooth-coloured composite fillings
  • Digital X-rays with minimal radiation
  • Preventive treatments (fluoride, sealants)
  • Early detection of gum disease and decay

Our Treatment Process

1

Consultation & Examination

Complete oral health assessment including digital X-rays.

2

Cleaning & Scaling

Professional removal of plaque and tartar buildup.

3

Treatment Planning

We discuss findings and create a customised care plan.

4

Treatment

Fillings, extractions, or other required procedures.

5

Follow-up Care

Guidance on home care and scheduling future visits.

We confirm within 2 hours • Free first consultation

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I visit the dentist?

We recommend a checkup and cleaning every 6 months for most patients.

Are dental X-rays safe?

Yes. Our digital X-rays use up to 80% less radiation than traditional X-rays and are completely safe.

How much does a dental checkup cost in Kolkata?

Our checkup and cleaning packages are very affordable. Book online or call us.

Do you treat children?

Absolutely! We have dedicated children's dentistry services with a gentle, fun approach.

Book Your Consultation

Call us immediately for same-day emergency dental care.
